name: VPN Manager V2
description: Bidirectional 3x-ui subscription and configuration manager for FIREBALL CMS
author: FIREBALL CMS
release_notes: External subscriptions and direct connection links now append after existing configurations, preserve first-party duplicates and support administrator-defined ordering.
Completed localization of operation types, sources, statuses, synchronization states, dependency reasons and conflict values in all plugin languages.
Manual synchronization now executes its exact queued operation immediately, with a recovery action for previously pending operations.
Added full reconciliation to the regular queue worker and localized live progress messages.
Added encrypted external subscription URLs and standalone VLESS, VMess, Trojan and Shadowsocks links with confirmed snapshots.
Added safe plan deletion that archives plans without breaking existing subscriptions or audit history.
Unified VPN administration row actions in the standard FIREBALL CMS dropdown menu.
Added an idempotent repair migration for installations whose earlier synchronization migration was journaled without credential and token-hash columns.
Added dependent subscriptions and connections with effective access status and cycle protection.
Added merged permanent subscription output, technical deduplication and administrator-defined dependency order.
Added cascade enable/disable, shared 3x-ui client protection and retryable dependency operations.
Added per-subscription connection ordering with drag-and-drop controls.
Added a configurable subscription profile name in VPN Manager settings.
Expanded bidirectional synchronization, conflict handling, audit logs and retry operations.
Improved server validation, encrypted credentials and safe remote client reconciliation.
